Name: Presidio Golf Course & Academy
Tagline: Located within a national park, San Francisco’s Presidio Golf Course is renowned for its spectacular forest setting, as well as its challenging play.
About: It was built in 1895 when Colonel William M. Graham, the Presidio’s commander at the time, allowed a group of businessmen known as the San Francisco Golf and Country Club to create a nine-hole course within the post.
Philosophy: Presidio Golf Course & Academy emphasizes a blend of tradition and innovation, fostering a love for the game through personalized coaching. They believe in developing both technical skills and strategic thinking in a serene natural setting.
Outcomes: Members and students of Presidio Golf Course & Academy often achieve improved handicaps and enhanced enjoyment of the game. The academy's focus on skill development leads to personal growth and lifelong engagement with golf.
Admissions: To enroll at Presidio Golf Course & Academy, interested individuals should visit their website for detailed information on membership options and lesson packages. Applications are accepted year-round, with flexible scheduling to accommodate diverse needs.
Quote: Where history and nature converge, discover your journey to mastery and serenity on the fairways.

Performance.Student Wellbeing: The Presidio Players Club is our membership program, fostering an inclusive community of golfers focused on promoting participation in public golf. The Club provides dedicated golfers with exclusive benefits, a rewards program and opportunities to engage with a passionate golf community.
Performance.Academic Integration: **Some sessions may be subject to change or cancellation if minimum of 5 attendees is not met.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Presidio Golf Course & Academy's instructors hold PGA certifications and have over 15 years of professional coaching experience, specializing in biomechanics and mental game strategies to enhance player performance.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of Presidio Golf Course & Academy have secured scholarships to top golf programs at universities like Stanford and UC Berkeley, and have won regional amateur championships, showcasing their competitive edge.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The academy boasts a state-of-the-art driving range, a short game practice area, and an 18-hole championship course set amidst the scenic Presidio forest, providing a comprehensive training environment.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress is meticulously tracked through bi-annual performance evaluations and personalized feedback sessions, ensuring continuous improvement and alignment with individual goals.
